calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Order Striking Claim
Off Calendar Oct-24-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner People of the State of California's motion for an order striking claim is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers
Off Calendar Aug-01-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner People of the State of California's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Respondent is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 21 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
